stories.title: Extreme Heat Threatens Players and Fans at 2026 World Cup
stories.desc: Researchers warn that rising temperatures could pose serious risks to players, fans, workers, and officials during World Cup matches starting in June.

stories.title: World Cup 2026 Driving Uneven Tourism Demand Across Host Nations
stories.desc: FIFA World Cup 2026 is reshaping tourism across the US, Canada, and Mexico with rising demand, soaring hotel prices, and connectivity gaps.
stories.source: Travel And Tour World 2 days ago

stories.title: Panini Launches Largest-Ever World Cup Sticker Album with 980 Stickers
stories.desc: Panini officially launched its 2026 FIFA World Cup sticker album on April 28 at Wembley Stadium, featuring 980 stickers including 68 special editions.

stories.title: Los Angeles to Host 8 Matches Including USMNT Opener
stories.desc: Los Angeles will host eight matches for FIFA World Cup 26, featuring the USMNT opening match against Paraguay on June 12, 2026.

stories.title: Coca-Cola Partners with Panini for Exclusive World Cup Stickers
stories.desc: Coca-Cola and Panini America announce first-of-its-kind partnership featuring 12 exclusive stickers hidden in specially marked 20-oz bottles.

stories.title: World Cup 2026 Expands to 48 Teams with New Format
stories.desc: Starting with this edition, the FIFA World Cup expanded to 48 teams, with twelve groups of four teams and a new round of 32 knockout stage.
